titleStmt.title: SII 22.315: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 315. (A.R. No. 315 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA—Date lost.

summary.p: This records a gift of half a māḍai of gold for burning a lamp during the service in the temple of Śrīkōvilanār at Gōvindapāḍi in Valla-nāḍu a division of Dāmarkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam by Vīraśōḻaṉ Tiruvaraṅgamuḍaiyāṉ a resident of a tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam village (name lost) belonging to the temple. The amount was entrusted with a priest of the temple by name Uyyavandāṉ Bhaṭṭan of Kāñjiram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu ṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu ciri kOvinta pāṭi niṉṟaruḷiya ci ko
vilaṉāṟku tāmaṟ koṭṭattu tāmal nāṭṭu Ivar tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam ve kiḻāṉ viracoṟaṉ tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉeṉ vaitta canti viḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟ tiruvārātaṉai
paṇṇum kāñcirattu tirunāuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉnāṉa Uyyavantāṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ kaikkoṇṭa māṭai Araikkum cantirātittavarai Oru cantiviḷakku Erikkakaṭaveṉ kāñci[rattu tirunāuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ Uyyavantāṉpaṭṭaṉeṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 22.315 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
